payload.text:
### Next Step: Run this SQL in Supabase
To make the storage permanent, go to your **Supabase Dashboard > SQL Editor** and run this command:

```sql
create table products (
  id uuid default gen_random_uuid() primary key,
  created_at timestamp with time zone default now(),
  name text not null,
  price numeric not null,
  category text,
  description text,
  image text,
  "inStock" boolean default true
);

-- Enable access
alter table products enable row level security;
create policy "Allow public read" on products for select using (true);
create policy "Allow all for authenticated" on products for all using (auth.role() = 'authenticated');
```

Once this is done, the "Database Setup Required" warning will disappear and your menu items will be stored permanently!
